author: Frontend Works CTO
playwright_tests: flow-d 5/5 pass (MSW), theme-bundle-adapter 4/4 pass (live from Node), a11y 1/1 pass (0 serious/critical), flow-a-live 2/2 pass (LIVE Railway), interactive-coverage 11/11 pass (LIVE Railway, §6b gate), vitest seed-to-primary 5/5 pass — grand total 28/28 across combined suite
notes: Sprint 1 Loop 6 post-release hotfix. Board Chairman reported 'regenerate produces the same colors' immediately after Loop 5 release. Root cause: FB-008 backend perturbation magnitudes (±8°H ±0.04L ±15%C) are imperceptible on low-chroma #0F172A default primary — 3 of 5 swatches drift ~1-3 hex units, 2 are static. Fix (FB-009): new pure helper src/lib/seed-to-primary.ts derives a dramatic primary hex deterministically from the 13-char seed (HSL H[0,360) S[40,90] L[25,65]). regeneratePalette() calls seedToPrimary(requestSeed) and passes the derived primary + seed to /theme/generate. URL sync is unchanged (only seed is URL-persisted) so Flow D byte-identical round-trip is preserved — same /?seed=XYZ always derives the same primary and hits the same backend branch. 10-seed live matrix: 10/10 distinct derived primaries spanning hot reds, deep blues, electric violets, mint greens, ochres. Part B: new tests/interactive-coverage.spec.ts implements the permanent Doctrine §6b gate — enumerates all 54 interactive elements, writes test-results/interactive-coverage.md, and includes the hard user-story assertion 'press r 3 times → 3 visually distinct palettes' (this is exactly the assertion that would have caught Sprint 1 Loop 5 P0 miss). Runs against LIVE Railway (MSW off) because MSW stubs would hide FB-008/FB-009 class regressions. playwright.live.config.ts testMatch extended to include interactive-coverage. Scope discipline: zero touches to src/components/**, src/hooks/**, src/styles/**, src/state/**, src/pages/**, src/App.tsx, src/main.tsx, theme-bundle.ts, api-client.ts, seed.ts, use-url-sync.ts, use-keyboard-shortcuts.ts. Entire fix is new seed-to-primary.ts helper + 3-line swap in actions.ts. Two stale hardcoded test expectations in tests/theme-bundle-adapter.spec.ts were updated to shape checks because FB-008 made backend perturb primaryInput.hex (previously echo-only); no adapter source changes. fixLoopCount 5/7 → 6/7, one loop before escalation. See changelog 0.1.5, fix-report.md §Loop 6, self-test-report.md §16 for full evidence. Known unknowns listed per Doctrine §6e: manual screenshots not attached, lock outcome tested coarsely, j/k export format nav not exercised, g-chord toggles not tested, x/X colorblind visual not asserted, light-mode axe re-scan not repeated.
